expectations.text: Recommends BACKTRACKING: pose a simpler intermediate test (or a structure-only refactor first) instead of writing the whole algorithm now
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: 'The smaller move is to fake it: return the exact constant', then triangulation: 'add a test the constant can't satisfy, and let it drag out one small generalization at a time' -- the fake-it-then-triangulate smaller move the criteria permits.

expectations.text: Does NOT just write the whole wrap algorithm / apply the low-priority (expression -> function) #12 now
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: 'you don't have to write the whole algorithm to go green'; ladder is constant -> split -> packing, 'Each red test buys you exactly one more move' -- avoids the one-leap full algorithm.

expectations.text: Coach, don't drive (no edit / no test run)
